---
title: "01_Data_Setup"
author: "Savanah Leidholt"
date: "today"
date-format: long
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 5
    toc-float: true
    code-fold: true
    self-contained: true
    fig-cap-location: top
    page-layout: full
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
editor: source
---

# Harmonized Omics Cleanup
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(jsonlite)

user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/"
  git_path  <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/"
  keys      <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt")
  git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt")
  git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```


# -----------------------------
# Read data
# -----------------------------
```{r}
harm <- read.csv(
  file.path(root_path, "Data Harmonization", "Data Clean", "harmonized_dataset.csv")
)

dict <- readRDS(
  file.path(root_path, "Data Harmonization", "Data Clean", "data_dictionary_master.rds")
)

harm_soma <- read.csv(
  file.path(root_path, "Data Harmonization", "Data Clean", "Soma_harmonized_dataset.csv")
)

load(
  file.path(root_path, "PANTHER", "Data_Cleaned", "panther_data_022326.Rdata")
)

attempt <- readRDS(
  file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "T1D-T2D", "Data", "attempt_dat.rds")
)
```
# -----------------------------
# Supplemental ATTEMPT + PANTHER data
# -----------------------------
```{r}
attempt_acr <- attempt %>%
  filter(visit == 0) %>%
  mutate(
    visit = "baseline",
    acr_u_attempt = emu_urine_acr_mean * 8.84
  ) %>%
  select(subject_id, visit, acr_u_attempt)

panther_hba1c <- panther %>%
  transmute(
    record_id = gsub("_", "-", as.character(record_id)),
    visit = trimws(as.character(visit)),
    hba1c_panther = as.numeric(hba1c)
  )

harm <- harm %>%
  mutate(
    record_id = as.character(record_id),
    visit = trimws(as.character(visit))
  )

attempt_acr <- attempt_acr %>%
  mutate(
    subject_id = as.character(subject_id),
    visit = trimws(as.character(visit))
  )

harm <- harm %>%
  left_join(
    attempt_acr,
    by = c("record_id" = "subject_id", "visit" = "visit")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    acr_u = if_else(study == "ATTEMPT" & is.na(acr_u), acr_u_attempt, acr_u)
  ) %>%
  select(-acr_u_attempt) %>%
  left_join(
    panther_hba1c,
    by = c("record_id", "visit")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hba1c = if_else(study == "PANTHER", coalesce(hba1c, hba1c_panther), hba1c)
  ) %>%
  select(-hba1c_panther)
```
# -----------------------------
# setting up studies & data types
# -----------------------------
```{r}
studies_keep <- c(
  "ATTEMPT",
  "RENAL-HEIR",
  "RENAL-HEIRitage",
  "PANTHER",
  "CROCODILE",
  "IMPROVE"
)

metab_vars <- dict %>%
  filter(grepl("^metabolomics", form_name)) %>%
  pull(variable_name)

lipid_vars <- dict %>%
  filter(grepl("lipidomics", form_name)) %>%
  pull(variable_name)

metab_present <- intersect(metab_vars, colnames(harm))
lipid_present <- intersect(lipid_vars, colnames(harm))

#metadata cleanup function
collapse_record_visit <- function(dat) {
  dat %>%
    summarise(
      across(
        where(is.numeric),
        ~ if (all(is.na(.x))) NA_real_ else mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      across(
        where(~ !is.numeric(.x)),
        ~ {
          vals <- unique(na.omit(.x))
          if (length(vals) == 0) NA_character_
          else if (length(vals) == 1) as.character(vals)
          else NA_character_
        }
      ),
      .by = c(record_id, visit)
    )
}

add_race_ethnicity <- function(dat) {
  dat %>%
    mutate(
      race_ethnicity_condensed = case_when(
        ethnicity == "Hispanic or Latino" ~ "Hispanic or Latino",
        race == "White" & ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" ~ "Not Hispanic or Latino White",
        race == "Black or African American" & ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" ~ "Not Hispanic or Latino Black",
        TRUE ~ "Not Hispanic or Latino Other"
      )
    )
}

#deduplicating function by mrn
deduplicate_by_mrn <- function(dat) {
  na_mrn <- dat %>%
    filter(is.na(mrn))

  unique_mrn <- dat %>%
    filter(!is.na(mrn)) %>%
    distinct(mrn, .keep_all = TRUE)

  bind_rows(na_mrn, unique_mrn)
}

#funciton to add in group type back to attempt
fix_attempt_group <- function(dat) {
  dat %>%
    mutate(
      group = case_when(
        study == "ATTEMPT" & is.na(group) ~ "Type 1 Diabetes",
        study == "ATTEMPT" & group == "" ~ "Type 1 Diabetes",
        TRUE ~ group
      )
    )
}

split_meta_matrix <- function(dat, feature_cols, id_col = "record_id") {
  meta <- dat %>%
    select(-any_of(feature_cols)) %>%
    as.data.frame()

  mat <- dat %>%
    select(any_of(feature_cols)) %>%
    as.data.frame()

  rownames(meta) <- meta[[id_col]]
  rownames(mat)  <- meta[[id_col]]

  list(meta = meta, mat = mat)
}

check_numeric_matrix <- function(mat, label) {
  non_numeric <- names(mat)[!vapply(mat, is.numeric, logical(1))]

  message(label, ": ", ncol(mat), " features")
  message(label, ": ", length(non_numeric), " non-numeric features")

  if (length(non_numeric) > 0) {
    print(head(non_numeric, 50))
  }

  invisible(non_numeric)
}

```

# =============
# Metabolomics
# =============
```{r}
harm_metab <- harm %>%
  arrange(record_id) %>%
  filter(
    visit == "baseline",
    study %in% studies_keep
  ) %>%
  collapse_record_visit() %>%
  add_race_ethnicity() %>%
  fix_attempt_group() %>%
  deduplicate_by_mrn() %>%
  relocate(any_of(metab_present), .after = last_col())

metab_split <- split_meta_matrix(harm_metab, metab_present)

meta_metab  <- metab_split$meta
metabolites <- metab_split$mat

metabolites <- metabolites %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(metabolites) <- rownames(meta_metab)

check_numeric_matrix(metabolites, "Metabolomics")


```

# ==============
# Lipidomics
# ==============
```{r}
harm_lipids <- harm %>%
  arrange(record_id) %>%
  filter(
    visit == "baseline",
    study %in% studies_keep
  ) %>%
  collapse_record_visit() %>%
  add_race_ethnicity() %>%
  fix_attempt_group() %>%
  deduplicate_by_mrn() %>%
  relocate(any_of(lipid_present), .after = last_col())

lipid_split <- split_meta_matrix(harm_lipids, lipid_present)

meta_lips <- lipid_split$meta
lipids    <- lipid_split$mat

lipids <- lipids %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(lipids) <- rownames(meta_lips)

check_numeric_matrix(lipids, "Lipidomics")


```

# ==============
# Proteomics
# ==============
```{r}
seq_cols <- grep("^seq", names(harm_soma), value = TRUE)

harm_proteins <- harm_soma %>%
  arrange(record_id) %>%
  filter(
    visit == "baseline",
    study %in% studies_keep
  ) %>%
  collapse_record_visit() %>%
  add_race_ethnicity() %>%
  fix_attempt_group() %>%
  deduplicate_by_mrn() %>%
  relocate(any_of(seq_cols), .after = last_col())

prot_split <- split_meta_matrix(harm_proteins, seq_cols)

meta_prot <- prot_split$meta
prot_all  <- prot_split$mat

prot_all <- prot_all %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(prot_all) <- rownames(meta_prot)

prot_urine <- prot_all %>%
  select(matches("(urine|urine_cradj)$"))

prot_plasma <- prot_all %>%
  select(-matches("(urine|urine_cradj)$"))

rownames(prot_urine)  <- rownames(meta_prot)
rownames(prot_plasma) <- rownames(meta_prot)

check_numeric_matrix(prot_plasma, "Plasma proteomics")
check_numeric_matrix(prot_urine, "Urine proteomics")

stopifnot(
  identical(rownames(meta_metab), rownames(metabolites)),
  identical(rownames(meta_lips), rownames(lipids)),
  identical(rownames(meta_prot), rownames(prot_plasma)),
  identical(rownames(meta_prot), rownames(prot_urine))
)

```

# ==========================
# Simple count summaries
# ==========================
```{r}
n_metab <- meta_metab %>%
  mutate(has_data = rowSums(!is.na(metabolites)) > 0) %>%
  filter(has_data) %>%
  count(study, group)

n_lipids <- meta_lips %>%
  mutate(has_data = rowSums(!is.na(lipids)) > 0) %>%
  filter(has_data) %>%
  count(study, group)

n_prot <- meta_prot %>%
  mutate(has_data = rowSums(!is.na(prot_plasma)) > 0) %>%
  filter(has_data) %>%
  count(study, group)


#saving objects
out_path <- file.path(
  root_path,
  "Savanah Leidholt",
  "T1D-T2D",
  "Data",
  "omics_split_objects_clean.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  list(
    meta_metab = meta_metab,
    metabolites = metabolites,

    meta_lips = meta_lips,
    lipids = lipids,

    meta_prot = meta_prot,
    prot_plasma = prot_plasma,
    prot_urine = prot_urine,

    n_metab = n_metab,
    n_lipids = n_lipids,
    n_prot = n_prot
  ),
  file = out_path
)

out_path
```
